title: CNBC Daily Open: Markets bet on a U.S.-Iran deal amid Hormuz blockade
summary_full: The U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz risks deepening the energy shock, but markets are  shrugging it off amid optimism for a deal.
summary_public: The U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz risks deepening the energy shock, but markets are  shrugging it off amid optimism for a deal.

IR.label: positive
